recommendation: Ship-ready brand contract. Two independent graders both returned PASSED with every dimension at the bar and the full BRAND-1..7 floor clean: a distinctive low-chroma pine + serif/grotesque/mono system that reads precise and grounded (not generic AI), all contrast pairs verified at or above WCAG AA, and a real four-layer token model where editing a token repaints the gallery. The single minor finding (40px control height) was fixed before handoff — interactive controls are raised to 44px at the mobile breakpoint.
assessed: Tessera self-contained gallery (current/index.html) with complete inline styles, tokens.json four-layer contract, and design-system.md spec; graded by two independent design-quality-gate runs, contrast computed numerically from the OKLCH tokens.
